name: RABBIT-FEATURE-BACKLOG-7
title: Wave 7 historical-burden sweep: drop phantom rabbit-spec/scope negatives + tombstone prose
description:
Wave 7 deletion-biased sweep. Drop phantom-defending tests against retired sibling features and trim 'legacy/formerly/post-consolidation' prose from active spec.

TEST DELETIONS:
- test/test-rabbit-feature-touch-uses-feature-spec.py: drop the legacy-rabbit-spec absence test (test_does_not_invoke_legacy_rabbit_spec, lines ~40-48); positive test_invokes_rabbit_feature_spec stays
- test/test-skill-md-resolve-scope-path.py: delete entire file (defends an absent path under a tombstoned directory)
- test/test-backlog-1-inv-5-8-coverage.py: drop test_inv5_step1_normal_mode_does_not_shell_out_resolve_scope (lines ~92-112); positive Skill invocation test stays

SPEC.md TRIMS:
- L269-275 Inv 24 RETIRED: shrink multi-paragraph tombstone to one-line 'RETIRED in v1.4.0 — see CHANGELOG'
- L316-326 Inv 32 RETIRED: same shrink
- L434-440: delete closing historical-cleanup narrative paragraph
- L25: drop 'the legacy rabbit-feature-scope feature directory has been retired to a residual marker' breadcrumb
- L200: drop 'bug.json is a legacy path that no longer exists' clause (keep positive item.json)
- L281: drop '(formerly rabbit-spec)' parenthetical
- L319: drop 'The legacy rabbit-spec directory has been retired' clause
- L400: drop 'post-consolidation cleanup and subsequent housekeeping cycles' clause

feature.json:
- L7 summary: trim 'Post-consolidation: the legacy rabbit-feature-scope and rabbit-spec feature directories are retired...' clause and '(renamed from rabbit-spec)' parenthetical

DOCSTRING TRIM:
- test/test-backlog-1-inv-5-8-coverage.py:4: drop 'previously had no direct test' historical context

PRESERVED: test-skill-md-bb-mode-item-json.py bug.json forbid test (real LLM-prose regen risk — bug.json paths still appear in archive/external prose).

OUT-OF-SCOPE: RABBIT-FEATURE-BACKLOG-4.
